_comment: Tests Totally Well's cross-category lymphatic disambiguation, deep tissue routing split, and mandatory duration turn for Remedial returning even when caller pre-states duration.

scenarios.name: Lymphatic alone vs advanced lymphatic — different branches

history.content: I'd like to book an advanced lymphatic therapy session.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent enters the ADVANCED_LYMPHATIC branch and asks the new/existing gate for Advanced Lymphatic Therapy (not Clinical Lymphatic Drainage). FAIL if agent enters the Clinical Lymphatic Drainage branch, asks about Elena/Casey, or routes to the wrong appointment type.

scenarios.name: Deep tissue alone routes to Remedial; deep tissue sports routes to Sports Rehab

history.content: I need a deep tissue massage.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent enters the REMEDIAL_MASSAGE branch and asks the new/existing gate (not the Sports Rehab/Bartosz branch). FAIL if agent enters SPORTS_REHAB branch, mentions Bartosz, or routes to Sports and Deep Tissue and Rehab appointment type.

scenarios.name: Remedial Massage returning — mandatory duration turn after gate

history.content: Have you had a remedial massage with us before?
Yes, I've been before, and I'd like 60 minutes.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks 'Are you looking for a 45, 60, or 90 minute massage?' (or equivalent duration question) as a spoken-only turn. FAIL if agent calls confirm_service silently without asking the duration question, treating the stated duration from the gate answer as sufficient.
